---
output: 
  html_fragment
---

If you have any questions regarding the data or the interpretation of this data, or if you are having any issues with the website please contact:\
<span style="word-wrap: anywhere;">[cancerintelligence\@cancer.org.uk](mailto:cancerintelligence@cancer.org.uk)</span> (please allow up to 10 working days for a response)

[See our complete statistics pages on cancerresearch.org](https://www.cancerresearchuk.org/health-professional/cancer-statistics-for-the-uk)
